visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a high-energy female host standing on a busy urban street in Taiwan, wearing a black-and-white plaid shirt over a grey top and black pants. She is gesturing enthusiastically with both hands toward the camera while introducing the topic of hair washing habits. Behind her, scooters are parked along the sidewalk, and city traffic is visible in the background under bright daylight. (2) The scene transitions into a series of street interviews where the host interacts with several young women. Each woman is shown in a medium shot, often holding a small black microphone. The settings are consistent with a commercial district, featuring brick buildings and retail storefronts. Icons of a yellow sun and a blue moon appear on screen to visually represent 'morning' and 'night' choices. (3) The host and three interviewees are seen gathered together, focusing on a rectangular beige bottle of shampoo. One of the women holds a small silver bowl, and they are seen smelling the product with expressions of surprise and delight. The lighting is natural and bright, highlighting the textures of their hair and the product packaging. (4) The host moves to an indoor setting, appearing in a bedroom with a large white bed and a bathroom with white marble tiling. She demonstrates the shampoo's texture, showing thick white foam on her palms. She is seen washing her hair with the foam, smiling at the camera, and later showcasing the smooth, shiny results of her hair from a back-view perspective. (5) The final sequence shows the host back in the bedroom, holding two different product bottles—the shampoo and a matching conditioner. She speaks directly to the lens with a persuasive expression, gesturing towards the bottles. The room is softly lit with warm indoor lighting, creating a comfortable and domestic atmosphere.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: 台灣人出來說說! 早上洗頭派 VS 晚上洗頭派. [Logo]: 韓國人問你! (2) [Subtitle]: 台灣人, 早上還是晚上洗頭? (3) [Subtitle]: 通常都是晚上洗. (4) [Subtitle]: 我自己是晚上洗頭. (5) [Subtitle]: 我偶爾會早上起來洗. (6) [Subtitle]: 有什麼原因嗎? (7) [Subtitle]: 通常就是.... [Subtitle]: 早上起不來. [Variety]: 哈哈哈. (8) [Subtitle]: 我是因為通勤, 我要騎車, 所以我要戴安全帽, 所以一定要回家洗頭這樣子. (9) [Subtitle]: 早上起來的時候如果頭髮很亂, 有時候可能用水抹一抹覺得, 不夠! 洗完之後再吹一下這樣子. (10) [Subtitle]: 給他們用看看, 韓國的特殊洗髮精! (11) [Logo]: (來自韓國). (12) [Subtitle]: 我之前有買過! [Variety]: (嚇到). (13) [Subtitle]: 它有點像就是香水味道. (14) [Subtitle]: 它有一個牛奶淡淡的香味. (15) [Subtitle]: 它那個香味直接飄出來~ (16) [Variety]: 很像Baby Powder那樣. [Subtitle]: 很清爽的那一種. (17) [Subtitle]: Q. 這種味道適合, 早上還是晚上洗? (18) [Subtitle]: 如果有時候出去約會的話, 也可以早上洗! (19) [Subtitle]: 因為可以有那個香水的感覺. (20) [Subtitle]: 都可以, 要去約會前都適合!!! (21) [Subtitle]: 剛剛很多人說「很像香水」對吧~? 香香的這款是 Milk Baobab 白麝香洗髮精. (22) [Subtitle]: 它是用牛奶瓶裝的洗髮精, 不只外表可愛, 泡沫超綿密, 洗起來超舒服! (23) [Subtitle]: 弱酸性配方, 洗完頭皮不會乾, 不緊繃. [Variety]: 裡面沒有矽靈. (24) [Subtitle]: 還可以幫頭皮平衡油水. 還有水解角蛋白跟植物萃取, 成分也是可以安心使用. (25) [Subtitle]: 頭髮洗完不只順, 還有一個很溫柔的香味. (26) [Subtitle]: 與同系列護髮乳一起使用, 香氣更持久喔!!! (27) [Subtitle]: 質地超像牛奶一樣滑順. 洗完吹乾之後, 整個人都香香的. (28) [Subtitle]: 真的超加分. 聽說他們沐浴乳產品是 田柾國同款. (29) [Subtitle]: 想知道更多資訊的話, 請參考文案裡面喔~!

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female host, 5 female interviewees, 1 male pedestrian in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long, dark, wavy hair, wearing a grey tank top under a black-and-white plaid button-down shirt and black trousers.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The outdoor street scenes feature Taiwanese city streets with traditional signs, parked scooters, and multi-story buildings. The indoor scenes show a modern bedroom with a tufted white headboard and a clean, marble-tiled bathroom with a vanity.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a fast-paced, upbeat electronic pop track characterized by a steady 4/4 beat and bright synth melodies. A high-pitched, enthusiastic female voice (the host) introduces the topic with rapid delivery and rising intonations. (2) Each transition between interview clips is punctuated by a crisp 'whoosh' or 'pop' sound effect. The interviewees' voices vary in pitch but generally remain within a conversational, positive valence range. Background street noise is extremely faint, suggesting professional post-production filtering. (3) During the product demonstration, the BGM remains constant while clear 'liquid splash' and 'squishing' sound effects are added to emphasize the foam's texture. A 'ding' SFX occurs when key product features are highlighted. (4) Laughter from a small group of women is heard under the music, accompanied by 'cartoon-style' emphasis sounds as they react to the shampoo's scent. The host's narration becomes more instructional and warm during the bedroom scenes. (5) The video concludes with the host's high-arousal summary, ending on a final 'ping' sound effect as a call to action is presented. The BGM maintains its energy until the very last frame.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Investigation -> Evidence -> Product Intro -> Demonstration -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a promotional advertisement for Milk Baobab White Musk Shampoo. It uses a street-interview format to engage the audience on the cultural question of hair washing times, then introduces the product as a solution for scent and scalp health, specifically targeting Taiwanese consumers with celebrity-linked endorsements (Jungkook).

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct presentation of product benefits, texture demonstration, and explicit verbal recommendation to check the caption for more info.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video effectively combines social proof via street interviews with personal demonstration. The high editing density and frequent text overlays are typical of successful short-form social media marketing in East Asian markets.
